findings.detail: Source-level pre-flight: 6 nodes (within 3-8), all bold labels <= 4 words, governing idea in config-block title ('The Embedding Projector — See Words as Dots'), no ghost node for the central concept. Layout is the intended LR pipeline (Long word vectors -> Squash to 2D/3D -> Cloud of dots -> Clusters of dots) with a small SEARCH callout branch (Search a word -> Nearest neighbours lit up) attached via a dotted 'pick a dot' edge from the clusters node — this matches the artifact intent ('Flow: high-dim vectors -> squash -> 2D/3D cloud -> clusters; with a callout on search -> nearest-neighbour highlight'), so the single branch is sanctioned, not linear_flow_branched. All labels trace to corpus: long vectors (§5.2 / §4, 100-300 numbers), squash to 2D/3D (§5.2), cloud of dots (§5.1, §6 step 1-2), clusters (§5.3), search a word (§5.4, §6 step 4), nearest neighbours ranked by cosine similarity (§5.4, §6 step 4-5). No scope-creep: no embedding-training internals and no squashing-maths nodes (both explicitly out of bounds per §5.5). PCA/t-SNE appear only as named buttons inside a 12px subtitle, never as a bare node label, so no jargon_label. Color tiers correct: entry nodes start (blue), automated squash/cloud steps auto (purple), terminal clusters + neighbours done (green). PNG render requires mmdc CLI — not available; visual inspection bypassed per established project pattern.

stats.layout: flowchart LR (PIPELINE direction LR + SEARCH direction TB callout)

preflight.mermaid_parse: pass (source-level check; mmdc unavailable for exec)
preflight.concept_fidelity: pass (all labels trace to corpus §5.1-5.4 and §6 procedure)
preflight.jargon_label: pass (PCA/t-SNE only in subtitle as named buttons, no bare acronym node label)
preflight.title_discipline: pass (governing concept in title: field; no ghost node for central idea)
preflight.single_path: pass (main pipeline is one straight LR path; the single SEARCH callout branch is explicitly required by the artifact intent, not scope-creep)
